title: Secrets of Strixhaven
summary: Judge-facing release notes for Secrets of Strixhaven, covering general set mechanics and main-set card-specific rulings.
headings: SECRETS OF STRIXHAVEN MAIN SET CARD-SPECIFIC NOTES
judgeFocus: Use the mechanics overview first when a table call turns on new set vocabulary or timing shortcuts.
The card-specific notes section is the fast lookup path once you know the exact card creating the issue.
This document is best treated as set-scoped guidance that complements CR and policy documents rather than replacing them.
